info.name: Addiction Recovery API
info.description: RESTful API for the Addiction Recovery Platform. This collection covers authentication, user management, support groups, therapy sessions, payments, notifications, and recommendations.

item.name: Auth

request.description: Register a new user with addiction profile information. Returns authentication token upon successful registration.

response.name: Success - User Registered
Validation Error - Missing Required Fields
Validation Error - Duplicate Mobile

request.description: Verify user's phone number with OTP code sent during registration.

response.name: Validation Error - Invalid OTP

request.description: Authenticate user with mobile number and password. Returns Bearer token for subsequent requests.

response.name: Success - Logged In
Validation Error - Missing Fields

request.description: Logout the current user and invalidate the token.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile with addiction profile and group information.

response.name: Success - User Profile

item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, and session management

item.name: Sessions

request.description: Get upcoming sessions for the user's group. Returns sessions scheduled at or after the current time.
Create a new therapy session. Only available to instructors and admins. Valid session_type: 'free' or 'paid'. Duration: 15-180 minutes. scheduled_at must be in the future.

response.name: Validation Error - Missing Required Fields
Validation Error - Invalid Session Type

exec: pm.test('Response contains session with relationships', function() {

request.description: Get details of a specific session including instructor and group information.

response.name: Success - Session Details
Not Found - Session Does Not Exist

request.description: Join an active therapy session. Records attendance with join timestamp.

response.name: Success - Joined Session
Error - Session Not Active

request.description: Leave an active therapy session. Records leave timestamp in attendance.

response.name: Error - Not In Session

request.description: Start a scheduled session. Only available to instructors and admins. Changes session status to 'live'.
End an active session. Only available to instructors and admins. Changes session status to 'finished'.

response.name: Error - Session Not Started

item.description: Therapy session management - view, create, join, leave, start, and end therapy sessions

item.name: Groups

request.description: Get the user's assigned support group with instructor and member details.

response.name: Success - My Group

request.description: Get list of all available support groups. Returns all active groups in the system.

response.name: Success - Groups List

item.description: Support group management - view user's assigned group and list all groups

item.name: Payments

request.description: Initiate payment for a paid session. Creates a pending payment record and returns gateway-specific payment data.

response.name: Success - Payment Initiated

request.description: Get paginated payment history for the authenticated user.
Receive payment gateway webhook notifications. Supports Paymob and Fawry gateways. Validates HMAC signature before processing.

item.description: Payment management - initiate payments, view history, and handle webhooks

item.name: Lookups

exec: pm.test('Response contains categories with substances', function() {

request.description: Get all active substance categories with their associated substances. Used during registration for addiction profile.

response.name: Success - Substances List

request.description: Get lookup values by type. Common types: addiction_duration, education_level, treatment_type.

response.name: Success - Lookup Values
response.body:
{
    "custom_code": 200,
    "status": true,
    "message": "Data retrieved successfully",
    "body": {
        "values": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "lookup_type_id": 1,
                "value_key": "less_than_1_year",
                "label_ar": "أقل من سنة",
                "label_en": "Less than 1 year",
                "sort_order": 1,
                "is_active": true
            },
            {
                "id": 2,
                "lookup_type_id": 1,
                "value_key": "1_to_5_years",
                "label_ar": "من 1 إلى 5 سنوات",
                "label_en": "1 to 5 years",
                "sort_order": 2,
                "is_active": true
            },
            {
                "id": 3,
                "lookup_type_id": 1,
                "value_key": "more_than_5_years",
                "label_ar": "أكثر من 5 سنوات",
                "label_en": "More than 5 years",
                "sort_order": 3,
                "is_active": true
            }
        ]
    },
    "info": "from response action"
}

item.description: Lookup data - retrieve reference data like substances, education levels, and treatment types

item.name: Recommendations

request.description: Get personalized recommendations. Without query param, returns general recommendations. With after_session, returns session-specific recommendations.

response.name: Success - General Recommendations
response.body:
{
    "custom_code": 200,
    "status": true,
    "message": "Data retrieved successfully",
    "body": {
        "recommendations": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "substance_category_id": null,
                "type": "support_group",
                "name_ar": "مجموعة دعم أصدقاء",
                "name_en": "Friends Support Group",
                "contact_info": "support@example.com",
                "latitude": 30.0444,
                "longitude": 31.2357,
                "is_active": true
            },
            {
                "id": 2,
                "substance_category_id": 1,
                "type": "treatment_center",
                "name_ar": "مركز علاج الإدمان",
                "name_en": "Addiction Treatment Center",
                "contact_info": "+201234567890",
                "latitude": 30.0131,
                "longitude": 31.2089,
                "is_active": true
            }
        ]
    },
    "info": "from response action"
}

response.name: Success - Session-Specific Recommendations

item.description: Get personalized recommendations for treatment centers, support groups, or other resources

item.name: Notifications

request.description: Get paginated list of notifications for the authenticated user.

response.name: Success - Notifications List

request.description: Create a new notification for the authenticated user. Valid types: session_reminder, payment_received, custom.

response.name: Success - Notification Created
Validation Error - Missing Required Fields

request.description: Get details of a specific notification.

response.name: Success - Notification Details
Not Found - Notification Does Not Exist

request.description: Update an existing notification. Can mark as read by setting read_at timestamp.

response.name: Success - Mark as Read
response.body:
{
    "custom_code": 200,
    "status": true,
    "message": "Notification marked as read",
    "body": {},
    "info": "from response action"
}

response.name: Not Found - Notification Does Not Exist

request.description: Delete a notification.

response.name: Not Found - Notification Does Not Exist

item.description: Notification management - create, read, update, and delete notifications

item.name: Users

request.description: Get paginated list of users. Only available to admins.

response.name: Success - Users List

request.description: Create a new user. Only available to admins. Valid roles: addict, instructor, admin.

response.name: Success - User Created
Validation Error - Missing Required Fields
Validation Error - Duplicate Mobile

request.description: Get details of a specific user.

response.name: Success - User Details
Not Found - User Does Not Exist

request.description: Update an existing user's information.

response.name: Validation Error - Invalid Role
Not Found - User Does Not Exist

request.description: Delete a user (soft delete). Only available to admins.

response.name: Not Found - User Does Not Exist

item.description: User management - create, read, update, and delete users (admin only)

item.name: Settings

request.description: Get all system settings. Settings control session price, group sizes, session schedule, booking cutoff, and auto-start timeout.

Get a specific setting by key. Valid keys: session_price, group_min_members, group_max_members, session_duration_minutes, booking_cutoff_minutes, session_start_hour, session_days, auto_start_timeout_minutes.

response.name: Not Found - Setting Does Not Exist

request.description: Update a setting value. The value must be a valid JSON string. For numbers use "1500", for arrays use "[\"sunday\",\"monday\"]".

response.name: Validation Error - Missing Value
Not Found - Setting Does Not Exist

item.description: System settings management - configure session price, group sizes, schedule, and timeouts
